packageRules.description: Pin Docker base images to digest so rebuilds are reproducible. Renovate will keep digests fresh; without this, FROM node:20-slim rebuilds against whatever the latest tag points to (supply-chain hijack risk per S3.2 audit finding).
Group all Docker image updates into one PR per week so we don't have 6 separate digest-bump PRs.
Group npm patch + minor updates so Sprint review doesn't get overwhelmed. Major bumps still get individual PRs because they often need code changes.
Security advisories bypass the schedule — open immediately so we don't sit on known vulns for a week.
